{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Hunter ships
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Hunter ships]] are used by the [[Iron Legion]] to blow targets apart with plasma cannons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
